blocks.text: Glimt carry 3-1 lead to San Siro — Norway holds its breath

Even Jürgen Klopp is asking "What are they doing?" Tomorrow night in Milan, Bodø/Glimt defend a stunning 3-1 first-leg lead against Internazionale. Norway's greatest-ever Champions League result is 90 minutes away.
